filters.gainersTooltip: Show only stocks with price increase
filters.losersTooltip: Show only stocks with price decrease

title: Watchlist
emptyDescription: Track stocks you're interested in to easily monitor their value.

quickStart.step1Desc: Go to the stocks page and find a stock you want to track.
quickStart.step2Desc: Click ☆ next to the stock to add it to your watchlist.
quickStart.step3Desc: View price and changes from this list whenever you want.

tooltips.sector: Industry sector the stock belongs to. Groups similar companies.
tooltips.dividendYield: Dividend yield - annual dividend as % of stock price. Higher yield = more annual dividend income.
tooltips.turnover: Total value of shares traded in EUR. Shows how actively the stock is traded.
tooltips.volume: Number of shares traded. Shows how actively the stock is traded.
tooltips.marketCap: Market cap - total value of all shares. Shows company size.
tooltips.peRatio: P/E ratio - years of earnings needed for ROI. Lower = potentially undervalued.
tooltips.change: Percent price change today. Positive = gain, negative = loss.

confirmClearAllDescription: This will remove all stocks from your watchlist. This action cannot be undone.
quickAddTooltip: Enter a ticker to quickly add it to your watchlist
